prompt: A photorealistic, wide-angle shot looking directly up into a forest canopy from the base of a single tree. The origin tree in the foreground is incredibly thin, fragile, and sparse, possessing only three barren branches. Each of its three branches reaches out and physically touches a neighboring tree. The three neighboring trees are staggeringly massive, ancient, and overwhelmingly dense, their canopies exploding with thousands of thick, intertwined branches that dominate the sky and weave into a vast network. A stark, uncanny contrast between the frail, isolated origin point and the impossibly dense, connected neighbors it touches. No text, no numbers.
visual_logic: Looking up from a fragile, sparse tree whose few branches touch neighboring trees. The neighbors are impossibly massive and densely entangled, physically visualizing a network where your connections are always vastly more connected than you.
